generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just last month in Chicago, our emergency response system was overwhelmed by a coordinated attack. First responders were delayed by bureaucratic red tape that prevented them from acting decisively. We can't afford to let this happen again. Stronger domestic security powers would give our heroes the tools they need to protect us without unnecessary delays. #NationalSecurityFirst
